title: Recover and display members data after deployment issues

requirements.text: In the backend main actor, audit the getAllMembers (or equivalent member listing) function to ensure it correctly reads and returns all stored member records from stable storage. Verify that member data is not accidentally filtered, cleared, or shadowed by any initialization logic that might overwrite stable variables on upgrade. If any such logic exists, fix it so that stable member data is preserved across upgrades and deployments.

quotes: You destroyed all members data just try to recover the members data please

acceptanceCriteria: All previously registered members stored in stable variables are returned by the member listing function after a canister upgrade.
No initialization or postupgrade logic clears or resets the members stable data structure.
The backend compiles and deploys without errors.

requirements.text: In AdminPanel.tsx, add a visible data recovery status banner at the top of the members section that shows the count of members loaded from the backend. If the members list is empty, display a prominent warning message (e.g., 'No members found — data may not have loaded. Please use the Reload button or contact support.') with a clearly labeled 'Reload Members' button that re-fetches the members list from the backend.

quotes: You destroyed all members data just try to recover the members data please

acceptanceCriteria: When members are present, the banner shows the correct member count.
When the members list is empty, a warning message is displayed with a Reload button.
Clicking the Reload button triggers a fresh fetch of members from the backend.
The UI reflects the updated member list after reloading.

constraints: Do not clear, reset, or overwrite any existing stable variables holding member data.
Do not change the member data schema or remove any existing fields.
Immutable frontend paths (useInternetIdentity, useActor, main.tsx, ui components) must not be modified.
nonGoals: Adding new member fields or changing the MLM commission structure.
Migrating data to a new storage format.
